workflow.name: Deploy Story
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
This workflow deploys a completed story through the 2-branch PR-based pipeline
NEVER push directly to develop or main - always use PRs via `gh pr create` + `gh pr merge`
NEVER use `git merge` to merge into protected branches - use `gh pr merge` instead
Pre-deployment validation is REQUIRED before production deployment

step.goal: Firebase MCP pre-flight + story verification + branch guard
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-preflight.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-validation.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-pr-develop.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-pr-main.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-firebase-deploy.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-cleanup-and-complete.md
